notes: BACKFLOW re-spec against the LIVE recording (validation drift; recording committed as-is). SAME root cause as session-reset — issue #906: the daemon does NOT promote the initial presession (proc-<PID>) to a real session_<id> before /compact rotates it away. The recording confirms it: proc-<PID> is born ready, binds its PID, and its transcript is REMOVED (the rotation) BEFORE any real session_<ts> dir ever reconciles; only the POST-/compact session appears as a real session_<id> and carries the observable working→ready turn. So the initial session is modeled as a PRESESSION-ONLY arc (presession_birth ready → pid_bind → old presession transcript_removed), and the post-/compact session as the real new_session birth carrying the turn. The original spec over-asserted a v1 real session with its own turn arc PLUS a compact_boundary second real session; on vibe only ONE real session ever materializes (#906). BACKFLOW observations: offline replay cannot reproduce vibe's meta.json sidecar, so model + tokens are UNVERIFIABLE offline — observations assert agent only (cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false), matching kiro-cli.

text: proc-<PID> pre-session appears in ready within 1s of launch — the INITIAL session, which #906 never promotes to a real session_<id> before /compact rotates it away
vibe PID bound to the presession within 1s (DiscoverPID by cwd + cmdline)

Spec: pre-compaction session disappears — /compact rotates the initial presession away: its transcript is removed BEFORE any real session_<ts> dir reconciles (issue #906: the initial session is never promoted, so its turn arc is never captured)

After /compact a fresh session_<ts2> dir (never seen before) reconciles and is born ready — the FIRST real vibe session the daemon captures, proving the session continues post-compaction under a new session_id
The post-compaction prompt drives the NEW real session ready → working — the single observable turn (must NOT match a stale transition on the presession row)
The post-compaction turn completes back to ready on the new session; final state ready, never entered waiting
